purpose: AIMO learns from life while School may also grow compact memory; AIMO uses AgentLife compact_memory_intake queue to avoid direct publish races.

pipes.AgentLife: AIMO acceptance-gated atom -> compact_memory_intake AgentLife packet -> locked merge queue

auto_rule: If School/digest/merge lock is active, queue only. Otherwise submit to queue and immediately run locked merge for bounded proof.
agent_view: AIMO should treat compact memory as one source-agnostic growing memory and resample memory state at each cycle boundary.
